Name: ReleaseNotesHub Pull Trigger
Description:
ReleaseNotesHub is a B2B\B2C SaaS solution that automates the generation and publication of release notes. With ReleaseNotesHub the creation of Release Notes becomes another step within your CI/CD pipeline. ReleaseNotesHub can pull content from many systems including TFS, Azure Devops, GitHub, Jira and Asana. 

Use this step to trigger a pull from your Octopus Deploy process. Visit [here](https://support.releasenoteshub.com/article/show/111570-how-to-trigger-a-pull-from-octopus-deploy) for setup guide. 

https://www.releasenoteshub.com

Parameters.Name: ReleaseNotesHub_ApiKey
Parameters.Label: ApiKey
Parameters.HelpText: The ApiKey can be copied from your ReleaseNotesHub Profile [page](https://support.releasenoteshub.com/article/show/105050-how-do-i-get-an-api-key).

Parameters.Name: ReleaseNotesHub_Name
Parameters.Label: Name
Parameters.HelpText: A Name can be specified when creating a new Release.

Parameters.Name: ReleaseNotesHub_Version
Parameters.Label: Version
Parameters.HelpText: Version is an optional parameter. If left blank, the Octopus Deploy system variable 'Octopus.Release.Number' will be used.

Parameters.Name: ReleaseNotesHub_ProjectId
Parameters.Label: ReleaseNotesHub Project Id
Parameters.HelpText: The ReleaseNotesHub Project Id can be copied from your ReleaseNotesHub Project [page](https://support.releasenoteshub.com/article/show/111560-how-to-get-project-id).

Parameters.Name: ReleaseNotesHub_Publish
Parameters.Label: Publish
Parameters.HelpText: Select false to create your release notes in draft status, or select true to Publish.

Parameters.Name: ReleaseNotesHub_IgnoreIfExists
Parameters.Label: Ignore if Release exists
Parameters.HelpText: If release already exists then ignore pull request.

Parameters.Name: ReleaseNotesHub_CreateOnNotFound
Parameters.Label: Create release if not found
Parameters.HelpText: If CreateOnNotFound is set to true and a Release with the specified version cannot be found, a release will automatically be created.
